languages.text: "Вы — собственность династии, а династия никогда не бросает то, что ей принадлежит!"
"You belong to the dynasty, and the dynasty never abandons its own."
languages.original_text: "Вы — собственность династии, а династия никогда не бросает то, что ей принадлежит!"

traits.locale_text: "You belong to the dynasty, and the dynasty never abandons what it owns."
"You belong to the dynasty, and the dynasty never abandons what it owns."
"You belong to the dynasty, and the dynasty never abandons its own."
"You belong to the dynasty, and the dynasty never abandons its own."
"You belong to the dynasty, and the dynasty never abandons its own."

languages.text: “你们属于这个王朝，而王朝从不抛弃自己人。”
languages.original_text: "You belong to the dynasty, and the dynasty never abandons its own."

traits.locale_text: “你们属于这个王朝，而王朝从不抛弃自己人。”

languages.text: "Hanedanlığa aitsiniz. Hanedanlık asla kendi adamlarını terk etmez."
languages.original_text: "You belong to the dynasty, and the dynasty never abandons its own."

traits.locale_text: "Hanedanlığa aitsiniz. Hanedanlık asla kendi adamlarını terk etmez."

languages.text: « Vous faites partie de la dynastie, et la dynastie n'abandonne pas les siens. »
languages.original_text: "You belong to the dynasty, and the dynasty never abandons its own."

traits.locale_text: « Vous faites partie de la dynastie, et la dynastie n'abandonne pas les siens. »

languages.text: «Pertenecen a la dinastía, y la dinastía nunca abandona a los suyos».
languages.original_text: "You belong to the dynasty, and the dynasty never abandons its own."

traits.locale_text: «Pertenecen a la dinastía, y la dinastía nunca abandona a los suyos».

languages.text: "Ihr gehört zur Dynastie und die Dynastie lässt ihre Leute nicht im Stich."
languages.original_text: "You belong to the dynasty, and the dynasty never abandons its own."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr gehört zur Dynastie und die Dynastie lässt ihre Leute nicht im Stich."

languages.text: 「貴様らは王朝に属しており、王朝は決して身内を見捨てはしない」
languages.original_text: "You belong to the dynasty, and the dynasty never abandons its own."

traits.locale_text: 「貴様らは王朝に属しており、王朝は決して身内を見捨てはしない」
